page_title: Aerial N² Mine Launching Maneuverable Orbital Satellite
text:
is an aircraft that appears in Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance.

Features

History

Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

A UN spacecraft deployed in low-Earth orbit to launch N² mines as a means of attack. It appeared during the initial fight against the Eighth Angel. Several Aerial N² Mine Orbital Satellites released N² mines on the Eighth Angel, however it was ineffective.
